title: News-Style Writing
description: Newspaper-style prose — proper nouns, dates, numbers, dependent clauses. Realistic everyday typing.

drills.content: City officials announced on Tuesday that the new transit line, which has been under construction since 2021, will begin limited service in October. Fares will start at $2.75, with discounts for students and seniors. Ridership is projected to reach 18,000 trips per day within the first year.
